name: chanter-auto-poster
description: Local TikTok/Instagram photo+video queue and scheduler for the CHANTER content workflow, backed by Firebase Firestore.

scripts.build: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/routes.js && node --check src/autoCaption.js && node --check src/autoCaptionProviders.js && node --check src/autoMusic.js && node --check src/scheduler.js && node --check src/ping-scheduler.js && node --check src/storage.js && node --check src/cloudinary.js && node --check src/tiktok.js && node --check src/instagram.js && node --check src/firestore.js && node --check src/postsMapper.js && node --check src/auth.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/pages/dashboard-accounting.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-demo-music.js && node --check test/auto-caption.test.js && node --check test/auto-caption-providers.test.js && node --check test/auto-music.test.js && node --check test/cloudinary.test.js && node --check test/dashboard-accounting.test.js && node --check test/firebase-config.test.js && node --check test/private-routes.test.js && node --check test/storage-upload.test.js && node --check test/posts-mapper.test.js && node --check test/scheduler.test.js && node -e "const ejs=require('ejs'),fs=require('fs'); for (const file of ['index.ejs','admin-login.ejs']) ejs.compile(fs.readFileSync('src/views/'+file,'utf8'),{filename:'src/views/'+file});" && vite build
